case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. BRIAN L WOLFE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLFE, BRIAN L $7,526.83 PRINCIPAL, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,756.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFE, BRIAN L
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED DEC-19-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFE, BRIAN L
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585; COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS EVID 1550; ATTY FEES AND COSTS CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFE, BRIAN L DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-2009
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-5
